case_title: CACH, LLC VS. LEELAND R SCHNEIDER

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CACH, L.L.C.'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
